declarations.name: localeLoadersContext
declarations.description: context to register module locale loaders
An application tile or icon that may be used in a launcher page or navigation area.
declarations.name: PolyfeaMdApp

cssProperties.description: Specifies the height of the tile card. Default value is `14rem`.
cssProperties.name: --app-card-height

cssProperties.description: Specifies the width of the tile card. Default value is `16rem`.
cssProperties.name: --app-card-width

cssProperties.description: Specifies the height of the tile image. Default value is `9rem`.
cssProperties.name: --app-card-tile-img-height

cssProperties.description: Specifies the background color of the tile image. Default value is `var(--md-sys-color-secondary-container, olive)`.
cssProperties.name: --app-card-tile-img-background-color

cssProperties.description: Specifies the `object-fit` style for the tile image. Default value is `cover`.
cssProperties.name: --app-card-tile-img-fit

slots.description: icon to replace the icon shown in navigation, rail, and drawer variants. Takes priority over `icon-src` and `material-icon` properties.
slots.name: icon

members.name: headline
members.description: The main title of the application.

members.name: headlineLocalizeId
members.description: The main title of the application.

members.name: shortHeadline
members.description: A shorter title of the application to display in icon variants.

members.name: shortHeadlineLocalizeId
members.description: Localize ID for translation instead of computed hash

members.name: supportingText
members.description: Additional text to display in the tile variant rendering.

members.name: supportingTextLocalizeId
members.description: Localize ID for translation instead of computed hash

members.name: tileImgSrc
members.description: The URL of the image to display in the tile variant rendering.

members.name: iconSrc
members.description: The URL of the image to display in the drawer, rail, or navigation variant rendering.

members.name: materialIcon
members.description:
This property specifies the name of the Material Symbol icon to be used.
It's only utilized if the `icon-src` property is not set.
For more details on Material Symbols, refer to the [Material Symbols documentation](https://fonts.google.com/icons).

members.name: tileImgDisabled
members.description:
This property disables the image in the tile variant rendering. If the `tile-img-src` property is not specified, the colored content is used instead.
When the tile image is disabled, only the `headline` and `supporting-text` properties are rendered.

members.name: href
members.description:
This property specifies the URL to navigate to when the element is clicked.
The click handler uses either the Navigation API's `navigate()` method or the History API's `pushState()` method.
For more details, refer to the [Navigation API](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Navigation/navigate) 
and [History API](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/History/pushState) documentation.

members.name: isActivePrefix
members.description:
This property specifies whether the element is rendered as active on all paths prefixed by href. By default, the element is only active
when the href matches the current path. If set then active indicator is  considered only by  pathname and hash components 
of the `href`attribute and it is set to true if this is a prefix of the current path+hash.

members.name: context
members.description:
This property specifies the context in which the element is rendered.
It's typically set by the `polyfea-context` element.
For more details, refer to the [`polyfea-context` documentation](https://github.com/polyfea/core/blob/main/src/components/polyfea-context/readme.md).

members.name: mode
members.description:
The mode in which the app anchor is rendered. If not specified then
the mode is determined by the context name prefix (e.g. `drawer-content` will be drawer mode, and `navigation-icons`
will be navigation mode). In all other cases, the default mode is `tile`.

declarations.description: List of application tiles. This component may be used as  launcher page for additinal applications.
declarations.name: PolyfeaMdApps

slots.description: This slot is for the content of the element, typically application tiles. You can use [polyfea-md-app](../polyfea-md-app/readme.md) or any other component. If a context area is specified and available, the slot content is not rendered. Instead, elements provided by the context are displayed.

members.name: applicationsContext
members.description:
name of the [polyfe-context](https://github.com/polyfea/core/blob/main/src/components/polyfea-context/readme.md)
element that will be used to render the applications web components.

attributes.name: applications-context
attributes.description:
name of the [polyfe-context](https://github.com/polyfea/core/blob/main/src/components/polyfea-context/readme.md)
element that will be used to render the applications web components.

declarations.description: A label component for use in Material Design drawers.
declarations.name: PolyfeaMdDrawerLabel

slots.description: additional content of the label, or the headline if the `headline` property is not used

members.name: headline
members.description: The headline of the label. May be empty if slot is used

attributes.name: headline
attributes.description: The headline of the label. May be empty if slot is used

slots.description: This slot is for the main content of the drawer, typically a list of navigation links. It can contain: * `polyfea-md-drawer-label`: A label separator in the drawer list. * `polyfea-md-app`: Set its 'context' property to "drawer-content" to use it as a navigation element. * `md-divider`: A divider in the drawer list. * other elements that can be used in a navigation drawer.

members.name: closeDisabled
members.description:
By default, the drawer includes a close button. If this property is set to true, the close button will be hidden. 
This can be useful when the drawer is used for navigation and a close button is unnecessary.

events.name: drawer-closed
events.description: Rised when the close button is clicked indicating the user want to close the drawer.

attributes.name: close-disabled
attributes.description:
By default, the drawer includes a close button. If this property is set to true, the close button will be hidden. 
This can be useful when the drawer is used for navigation and a close button is unnecessary.

members.name: locales
members.description: list of supported locales

members.name: currentLocale
members.description: current selected locale

members.name: flagIconsPath
members.description: Path to the flag-icons CSS file

attributes.name: locales
attributes.description: list of supported locales

attributes.name: current-locale
attributes.description: current selected locale

attributes.name: flag-icons-path
attributes.description: Path to the flag-icons CSS file

declarations.description: A navigation bar component, typically used at the bottom of the screen on mobile devices.
declarations.name: PolyfeaMdNavigationBar

slots.description: This slot is for the navigation items. * `polyfea-md-app`: Set its 'context' property to "navigation-content" to use it as a navigation item.

declarations.description: A navigation rail component, typically used on the side of the screen on medium to large devices.
declarations.name: PolyfeaMdRail

slots.description: This slot is for the main content of the rail, typically a list of navigation actions. Use `polyfea-md-app` with attribute `context="rail-content"`.
This slot is for the primary action's FAB of the rail.
slots.name: primary-action

members.name: drawerDisabled
members.description: The rail show drawer open icon by default. Set this property to true to hide it

members.name: contentPosition
members.description: The alignment of the navigation actions.

events.name: drawer-opened
events.description: Raised when the drawer open icon is clicked indicating the user want to open the drawer.

attributes.name: drawer-disabled
attributes.description: The rail show drawer open icon by default. Set this property to true to hide it

attributes.name: content-position
attributes.description: The alignment of the navigation actions.

declarations.description:
A Material Design based application shell component that provides a structured layout with a top bar, navigation drawer, navigation rail, and main content area.
It provides slots to customize these areas and context areas for dynamic content injection using polyfea-context. Embedded is a style element with Material Design tokens for colors, typography, and shapes.
declarations.name: PolyfeaMdShell

slots.description: Place content in the leading icon area of the top bar. Defaults to the drawer icon.  Overridden by `topbar-leading-icon` context area.
slots.name: topbar-leading

slots.description: Place content in the trailing icon area of the top bar. Defaults to the menu icon. Overridden by `topbar-trailing-icon` context area.
slots.name: topbar-trailing

slots.description: Place content in the top bar's menu area. Overridden by `topbar-menu-items` context area. Use [md-menu-item](https://github.com/material-components/material-web/blob/main/docs/components/menu.md#mdmenuitem-md-menu-item) for menu items.
slots.name: topbar-menu

slots.description: Place content in the navigation bar. Recommended: [polyfea-md-app](../polyfea-md-app/readme.md) elements. Overriden by `navigation-content` context area.
slots.name: navigation

slots.description: Place content in the navigation rail. Recommended: [polyfea-md-app](../polyfea-md-app/readme.md) elements. Overriden by `rail-content` context area.
slots.name: rail

slots.description: Place content in the navigation drawer. Recommended: [polyfea-md-app](../polyfea-md-app/readme.md) elements. Overriden by `drawer-content` context area.
slots.name: drawer

slots.description: Place content in the main content area. For landing page, use [polyfea-md-apps](../polyfea-md-apps/readme.md) element. Overriden by `main-content` context area.

Place content in the primary action area of the navigation rail. Recommended: [md-fab](https://github.com/material-components/material-web/blob/main/docs/components/fab.md) elements. Overriden by `rail-primary-actions` context area. Overriden by `rail-primary-action` context area.
slots.name: rail-primary-action

members.name: applicationHeadline
members.description:
The name of the application displayed in the top bar. This is only shown
if the `app-shell-title` context area is empty.

members.name: topbarMoreDisabled
members.description: If set to true, the menu button on the right side of the top bar will be hidden.

members.name: drawerDisabled
members.description: If set to true, the navigation drawer will be hidden in all screen resolutions.

members.name: drawerCloseDisabled
members.description: Determines whether the close button in the navigation drawer is hidden.

members.name: railDisabled
members.description: If set to true, the navigation rail will be hidden in all screen resolutions.

members.name: navigationDisabled
members.description: If set to true, the navigation bar will be hidden in all screen resolutions.

members.name: topbarVariant
members.description: Variant of the topbar. See [Top App Bar](https://m3.material.io/components/top-app-bar/overview) documentation.

members.name: smallBreakpointRem
members.description: Small media size breakpoint in rem.

members.name: mediumBreakpointRem
members.description: Medium media size breakpoint in rem.

members.description: scaling multiplier for default font-size of particular theme roles

members.name: themeMenu
members.description: Controls the visibility of the legibility buttons (font size adjustment, theme toggle) in the top bar menu.

members.name: localesPath
members.description:
URL to locales base path from where to load extra localization files (e.g. '/locales'). Locales are expected to be in <locale>.js files.
These locales may overload built-in localizations that are otherwise registered in the context `locales-loaders`.

members.name: locales
members.description: List of locales to load extra localization files for.

members.name: localeMenu
members.description: If set to true, a locale selection menu will be displayed in more action menu

declarations.description:
A control component to toggle between light and dark themes or adjust font sizes.
It can be rendered as an icon button, a menu item, or a hidden preset loader.
declarations.name: PolyfeaMdThemeControl

members.name: variant
members.description:
This property controls the display variant of the theme control. It can be used to render the control
as an icon button or a menu item.

The "preset" variant doesn't render anything but initializes the theme based on user preferences stored in local storage.
Include this in your document to ensure the theme is properly initialized.

members.name: control
members.description: This property specifies which aspect of the theme is controlled by this element.

events.name: theme-changed
events.description: Fired when the theme is changed by the user.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description:
This property controls the display variant of the theme control. It can be used to render the control
as an icon button or a menu item.

The "preset" variant doesn't render anything but initializes the theme based on user preferences stored in local storage.
Include this in your document to ensure the theme is properly initialized.

attributes.name: control
attributes.description: This property specifies which aspect of the theme is controlled by this element.

declarations.description: An element for top application bars following Material Design guidelines.
declarations.name: PolyfeaMdTopbar

slots.description: The headline of the top bar. If not provided, the value of the `headline` property is shown.
slots.name: headline

slots.description: The leading icon or button of the top bar. If not provided, the content is controlled by the `leading-icon` property.
slots.name: leading

slots.description: The trailing actions - icons or buttons of the top bar,
slots.name: trailing

slots.description: The menu items of the "more actions" menu. Shall be elements of type `<md-menu-item>`.
slots.name: menu

members.name: headline
members.description: Text of the headline

members.name: leadingIcon
members.description:
Icon to show in the leading position of the top bar if the `leading` slot is left empty. 
Possible values are:
- `none` - No icon is shown.
- `drawer` - A menu icon is shown that opens the drawer.
- `back` - A back icon is shown that emits a `back` event.

members.name: variant
members.description: Variant of the applications top bar - changes the layout and size of the top bar.

members.name: moreActionsDisabled
members.description: Controls if right side icon with more actions menu is rendered

events.name: drawer-opened
events.description: Emitted when clicking on the drawer leading icon button. Refers to parent to handle side navigation.

events.name: back
events.description: Emitted when clicking on the back leading icon button.

attributes.name: headline
attributes.description: Text of the headline

attributes.name: leading-icon
attributes.description:
Icon to show in the leading position of the top bar if the `leading` slot is left empty. 
Possible values are:
- `none` - No icon is shown.
- `drawer` - A menu icon is shown that opens the drawer.
- `back` - A back icon is shown that emits a `back` event.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Variant of the applications top bar - changes the layout and size of the top bar.

attributes.name: more-actions-disabled
attributes.description: Controls if right side icon with more actions menu is rendered

declarations.name: sourceLocale
declarations.description: The locale code that templates in this source code are written in.

declarations.name: targetLocales
declarations.description:
The other locale codes that this application is localized into. Sorted
lexicographically.

declarations.name: allLocales
declarations.description: All valid project locale codes. Sorted lexicographically.
